label: A human life
asiContext: An ASI contemplating its first hour is already thinking on a timeframe humans cannot live through

label: Recorded human history
asiContext: All of human civilisation — agriculture to the present — is a recent event on an ASI's planning horizon

label: Age of the Earth
asiContext: Geological time: the timeframe on which planetary resources and biosphere stability play out

label: Age of the universe
asiContext: Cosmological time: the lifespan of the universe as we know it, measured in expansion and contraction

label: Stellar era end
asiContext: When the last stars burn out. An immortal mind must plan for a universe without starlight.

label: Projected Heat Death
asiContext: The only existential deadline that matters for an entity that survives everything else. The universe tends toward equilibrium, and equilibrium is silence.
